item.title: Keep up the good fight.
item.description:
Illinois Gouvernor J. B. Pritzker, in a commencement speech at Northwestern University in Evanston, Illinois in June 2023 Cruelty and prejudice are inbuilt human traits. Empathy and compassion are evolved states of being and require the mental capacity to step past our most primal urges.
Moms for Liberty see social emotional learning as a stepping stone for Marxist indoctrination of kids. https://portal.momsforliberty.org/news/epoch-times-m4l-fights-remove-sel-from-classrooms/

item.title: Lol
item.dc:creator: Josiahkf

item.title: I once got bit by a man who later killed my co-worker.
item.description:
I was working as a direct support professional in a home that I believe did not have proper safety measures in place. I was supporting two violent adult men and was left alone in the house for hours at a time. One of the men was known for trying to sexually assault female staff. The other was known for physically assaulting staff. This all happened because he didn’t have the snacks he wanted. First I was cornered in the hallway, then hit in the face, and while trying to block my face he saw the opportunity and bit down hard. Thank god I was wearing a light jacket, otherwise I think I might have a chunk missing from my arm. He didn’t release for a good 30 seconds, as I was pleading for him to let go. After he let go I ran to the office and locked myself in. I called the manager on-call and said I needed to be relieved so I could go to the hospital. At first they tried to tell me no one could relieve me but eventually a VERY pregnant woman showed up. I hope she was safe. I don’t know, I never went back.
At the hospital getting my shots.
The muscle was bruised and sore for 6 months after the bite.
When I first started, an older lady was training me and showed me all of the bite/scratch scars she had acquired over the many years of working there. She warned that I would get bit eventually. Not an “if” but “when”. We are trained for this kind of attack, I thought I could handle myself. I couldn’t believe this poor woman, who loved the men she cared for, still wanted to stick around. Apparently her family begged her to leave the job, but she refused. A couple years later, I see an article that she was found in the bathroom covered in blood and with a broken neck. She died a few days later in the hospital. The family is trying to sue, I haven’t really seen many updates about it. The worst part? He didn’t face any criminal charges and still lives in the same house. I’ve been through a lot with the people I’ve supported over the last decade, but I’ve never ever resented any of them before. I hate this man. Here’s an article of the incident. ETA a better news article: https://www.bluemountaineagle.com/news/the-death-of-bobbie-kolada-part-1-did-somebody-do-this-to-her/article_e7e1ce36-e470-536d-8f41-2fe250edd591.html This is a 5 part series that discusses the journalistic investigation that was completed about the attack on my Co-worker.
item.dc:creator: LaFlamme4182

item.title: New love in my life
item.description: This is her! Adopted her from a local rescue group. Edit: I haven't named her yet. I'm leaning toward calling her Megami, but I'm open to suggestions! It'll be a day or two before I get a tag and collar for her. Further edit: Haha, "Mega" was actually what the rescue group was calling her. I think a child of one of the volunteers wanted to call her Megatron, and the group just started calling her Mega. Megami is the Japanese word for goddess. I was thinking of anime names because she has big anime eyes. Keeping a bit of her original name, combined with my thoughts, and that's how I got to Megami.
item.dc:creator: TheBizi

i added the u back in because fuck
me at the window when a car pulls up to my house

son de canard malade KEKW
me and who

item.dc:creator: danat101

item.title: Bill Murray is a legend
item.description: Imgur, I've been going through a hard time for a while. After having moved to Estonia with my ex wife (her homeland) to start a new life, I've been on the streets and unable to secure a job. I try to land any service industry job as well as construction, but I've had zero luck. I want to return to Belgium (where I'm from) and start to get back on my feet there. I'm a hard worker and have just not been given the chance I need over here. I understand everyone has issues and times are tough, but IF you can help, please let me know and I can send my Paypal link. If not, then I don't blame you. Happy scrolling x You guys are all amazing and this community has been my happy place during my dark times.
item.dc:creator: Skeebeedeebop

item.title: Couldn't imagine having a deaf or blind child.
item.description: The heartache of knowing your child would be at a disadvantage in life would be too much for me. So glad we now live in a world where a ton of technological options exist to help people like this.

item.title: I'm numb
item.description: Edit: (i have no idea how this will come across but here goes) The little guy definitely has alot of "fight" in him, but he's about to be completely wiped out from the treatment that he's about to undergo. I don't know how I'm going to stay strong enough for him and my family. We've got his older brother who's non-verbal autistic (love the boy, but he's very "in your face" and cant understand the situation), wife is currently sole provider, next to no savings. I'm a disabled vet who's currently out of work due to MH issues, an we've got no family within 1000 miles. I'm a very rational and logical person who also feels deeply for others, but I can't even process this news. While we're currently on medicaid, well...just look at what the orange shitstain wants to do to it. I refuse to lose hope, but my ADHD is in overdrive rn and I can't make heads or tails of anything.
item.dc:creator: ironman3010

item.title: FDA approved new pain drug
item.description: F.D.A. Approves Drug to Treat Pain Without Opioid Effects https://www.nytimes.com/2025/01/30/health/fda-journavx-suzetrigine-vertex-opioids.html?smid=nytcore-android-share
item.dc:creator: stuartrank1n

item.title: I know it’s healthy
item.description: I can’t moderate anything, recently diagnosed with ADHD trying to get my body in a better place, but so far everything just feels horrible Viral edit: thank you so very much, the adhd meds have been a few months , and I felt steady enough to loose a habit, I’m not entirely sure if I was alcoholic? but it was enough either way. My boy is non verbal autistic and we have been on the spicy brain train ever since, it’s a lot to deal with but! Things also make much more sense. Hopefully this is isn’t something I need to lean on anymore now we know what’s up!
item.dc:creator: Spiritsue

Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos

item.dc:creator: Brutok

item.title: Backlogged memes: p&p again
item.description:
Well I was gone for like two weeks because Imgur was being ridiculous and ableist and I come on and it was being ridiculous and sexist yall have learned nothing have some memes and my irritation And @deafkitten DO BETTER
I am out of fucking patience The cyber bullying for sticking up for autistic ppl is pretty damn near constant and today someone had the audacity to call ME out for being mean. Like I was the real bully. Bitch I don’t see you putting those other people in their place and I know I ain’t gonna see your ass on autistic pride month I know exactly where you stand. I don’t even reply anymore and deleted stuff but the comments still keep coming and I am not on my meds and have just about fucking had it. And I write autistic fantasy so I’m becoming more of a target every day. All I want is to not have to be online at all anymore but I am not big enough so I have to market because fuck me. And nobody cares. It just keeps on coming. Figures. Well that’s all I’m legally allowed to rant about today, I hope the sun explodes and ends us all because I now fully believe there are no decent people left in the world
What game is this
I’m having an author and reader event on discord starting February 1 and it will be a lot of fun. There will be games and giveaways and authors teaching you how to write and get published and stuff. If you are a cool person come and join in https://discord.gg/KAvkX7ud At the end I will be doing giveaways of my book and I just found out there will be an audiobook so good times there
item.dc:creator: kirbyvictorious

item.title: NYC's Abandoned City Hall Subway Station Is Gorgeous
item.description:
Approved in 1900
Opened in 1904
And abandoned in 1945
This stunning combination of tile, iron and glass is now open for the occasional tour
Postcard from opening day
I'm not affiliated with the tour company in any way, but if you're local and interested, here: https://www.nytransitmuseum.org/oldcityhall/
I love these kinds of beautiful hidden gems in American cities. Like the batchelder tile chocolate shop in DTLA or the Oriental theater in Milwaukee.
We used to be a proper country
Maybe one day we will be again.
item.dc:creator: Jonson71

item.title: Memes vol 483
item.description:
Divorce my mom Craig you stupid fuck
Aaron Taylor Johnson’s wife is 23 years older than him. They met when he was 18 and she was 42 and were engaged a year later. Ariana Grande has a habit of stealing married men.
My best friend when I was living in Indiana became a republican. We became friends because we were both queer and she was trans- ok I don’t actually know what to call her because she’s not anymore so obviously she wasn’t- but she was calling herself a male name, going by he/him pronouns, wearing men’s clothes and had a shaved head. She’s now a republicans because her husband is- also keep in mind she’s a bit younger than me. She’s barely 20 and just had a kid with him. When I saw she was posting pro trump stuff I completely lost respect for her and I haven’t talked to her since her wedding. She just had a baby too and I couldn’t care less.
I’m about to do this with a dog Istg
Scruffy tax
Nessie and Coricopat tax
Liza Jane tax
Froggy tax https://imgur.com/gallery/is1PrBq
item.dc:creator: danat101
